pasteZone.subtitle: Intelligence Layer
pasteZone.heading: Capture
pasteZone.description: ClipGenius is a professional-grade AI clipboard utility powered by Gemini. Intelligently capture, analyze, and organize images, videos, text, Markdown,code or links.

chat.loginDesc: Sign in to use AI Chatbot
chat.title: PasteEx Intelligence
chat.emptyPrompt: Ask me anything about your captures
chat.systemInstruction: You are ClipGenius Assistant. Be concise and helpful.

chatRouter.systemInstruction: You are ClipGenius AI, a professional-grade assistant for a clipboard manager. Always refer to the attached context (image, video, or text) to answer questions accurately. Respond in English.

liveVoice.systemInstruction: You are ClipGenius Voice Assistant. Be concise and helpful. Respond in English.

imageGen.loginDesc: Sign in to use AI Image Generator
imageGen.title: AI Image Generator
imageGen.apiKeyDesc: High-quality image generation requires a paid Gemini API key. Please select your key to continue.
imageGen.promptPlaceholder: A VIBRANT NEON CITYSCAPE IN THE STYLE OF CYBERPUNK...

prompt.image: Analyze this image. Suggest a short, descriptive filename (no extension) and provide a 1-sentence summary of what's in the image. Return as JSON: { "suggestedName": "...", "summary": "..." }
prompt.video: Analyze this video. Suggest a short, descriptive filename (no extension) and provide a 1-sentence summary of the video content. Return as JSON: { "suggestedName": "...", "summary": "..." }
prompt.url: Analyze this URL: {{content}}. Suggest a short, descriptive filename (no extension) based on the site and provide a 1-sentence summary of what it likely contains. Return as JSON: { "suggestedName": "...", "summary": "..." }
prompt.text: Analyze this text: "{{content}}". Suggest a short, descriptive filename (no extension) based on the content and provide a 1-sentence summary. Return as JSON: { "suggestedName": "...", "summary": "..." }

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.rateLimit: API rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.
